creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't reproduce inside 12.2/13.0 amd64 jail. SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION was introduced in ports b2302fb4a315 and didn't change since then e.g.,

  $ rg SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION /usr/local/include
  /usr/local/include/svt-av1/EbSvtAv1.h
  36:#define SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION(major, minor, patch)                            \
